nasb.text: And he was afraid and arose and ran for his life and came to Beersheba, which belongs to Judah, and left his servant there.

esv.text: Then he was afraid, and he arose and ran for his life and came to Beersheba, which belongs to Judah, and left his servant there.

cnv.text: 以利亞害怕，就起來，逃命去了。他到了猶大的別是巴，就把自己的僕人留在那裡。

ccb.text: 以利亚很害怕，连忙逃命，来到犹大的别示巴。他让仆人留在那里，
